title: The Blue Ridge Parkway: A Long and Winding Road
original_title: The Blue Ridge Parkway: A Long And Winding Road
overview: THE BLUE RIDGE PARKWAY: A LONG & WINDING ROAD is the first historical documentary about the most-visited segment of the U.S. National Park Service. The documentary reveals for the first time, a stunning secret deal between FDR and a powerful congressman that changed the U.S. forever.
